query:
SELECT m.id, m.title, m.slug, s.id as slide_id, s.title as slide_title, s.layout, s.orderIndex, LEFT(s.content, 100) as content_preview
FROM modules m
LEFT JOIN slides s ON s.moduleId = m.id
WHERE m.slug LIKE '%boas-vindas%' OR m.title LIKE '%Boas-vindas%'
ORDER BY m.id, s.orderIndex;
